content.problemStatement:
Given NNN, AAA and BBB, find the value of the following expression:

‚ąĎi=0N‚ąĎj=0Ngcd(Ai+Bi,Aj+Bj)\sum_{i=0}^{N} \sum_{j=0}^{N} \text{gcd}(A^i + B^i, A^j + B^j)i=0‚ąĎN‚Äčj=0‚ąĎN‚Äčgcd(Ai+Bi,Aj+Bj)Since the value can be large, find it modulo (109+7)(10^9 + 7)(109+7).


Input Format

The first line of the input contains an integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
Each test case consists of a single line containing three space-separated integers ‚ÄĒ AAA, BBB, and NNN.


Output Format

For each test case, output a single line containing the value of the expression modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
constraints: GCD(A,B)=1\text{GCD}(A, B) = 1GCD(A,B)=1, i.e., AAA and BBB are coprime.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1. The summation expands to gcd(1,1)+gcd(5,1)+gcd(1,5)+gcd(5,5)=8\text{gcd}(1,1) + \text{gcd}(5,1) + \text{gcd}(1,5) + \text{gcd}(5,5) = 8gcd(1,1)+gcd(5,1)+gcd(1,5)+gcd(5,5)=8.
Example case 2. The summation expands to gcd(1,1)+gcd(3,1)+gcd(1,3)+gcd(3,3)=6\text{gcd}(1,1) + \text{gcd}(3,1) + \text{gcd}(1,3) + \text{gcd}(3,3) = 6gcd(1,1)+gcd(3,1)+gcd(1,3)+gcd(3,3)=6.
